title: Zebra Technologies to Present at the Nasdaq 46th Investor Conference
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $ZBRA--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), an innovator at the edge of the enterprise with solutions and partners that enable businesses to gain a performance edge, today announced that the company will present at the Nasdaq 46th Investor Conference in London, on Tues., June 14, 2022 at 7:30 a.m. Central Time (1:30 pm GMT).
